QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: telemetrySave
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Automatically save a telemetry log file after each flight completes.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: If this option is enabled a telemetry will be saved after each flight completes.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Save log after each flight

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: telemetrySaveNotArmed
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Also save telemetry logs from sessions where the vehicle was never armed.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: If this option is enabled a telemtry log will be saved even if vehicle was never armed.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Save logs even if vehicle was not armed

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: apmStartMavlinkStreams
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Request ArduPilot to begin sending MAVLink telemetry streams on connect.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Request start of MAVLink telemetry streams (ArduPilot only)

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: saveCsvTelemetry
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Save all vehicle parameters to CSV files at 1 Hz during flight.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: If this option is enabled, all Facts will be written to a CSV file with a 1 Hertz frequency.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Save CSV log of telemetry data

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: forwardMavlink
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Forward all MAVLink messages to an external address for other ground stations.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Enable

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: forwardMavlinkHostName
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Network address and port to forward MAVLink messages to (e.g. localhost:14445).
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Host name to forward mavlink to. i.e: localhost:14445
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Host name

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: forwardMavlinkAPMSupportHostName
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Ardupilot Support server to forward mavlink to. i.e: support.ardupilot.org:xxxx
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Ardupilot Support Host name

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: sendGCSHeartbeat
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Periodically transmit heartbeat messages to inform vehicles that QGC is connected.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Emit heartbeat

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: gcsMavlinkSystemID
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: MAVLink system identifier (1-255) for this ground station.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: MAVLink System ID

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: noInitialDownloadWhenFlying
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Skip downloading parameters and missions when connecting to a vehicle already in flight.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: When enabled, parameter and mission plan downloads are skipped when connecting to a vehicle that is already flying. This prevents bandwidth-heavy transfers from disrupting an active flight.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Skip param/plan download if flying on connect
